Best AI SEO tools for Shopify

Compared by fit, pricing model, and Shopify use case.

ToolCategoryPricingBest fit
SemrushSEOPaidBest for stores serious about organic traffic and content operations.
AhrefsSEOPaidStrong for finding long-tail ecommerce keywords and link opportunities.
Surfer SEOSEOPaidUseful for turning product guides into more competitive search pages.
FraseSEOPaidGood for repeatable article briefs and FAQ extraction.
ClearscopeSEOPaidBest for teams willing to invest in fewer, stronger evergreen pages.
